subject: [PATCH v3 11/28] nfsd: allow nfsd to get a dir lease with an ignore mask

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch allows the NFS server to obtain a directory lease with an ignore mask, enabling it to filter out specific notification types. The patch introduces a new function `nfsd_notify_to_ignore` that maps notification types to corresponding flags in the file lease structure. This change affects the `nfs4_alloc_init_lease` and `nfsd_get_dir_deleg` functions, which now take an additional `notify` parameter to specify the ignore mask. The patch aims to improve the flexibility of directory leases by allowing clients to customize the notifications they receive.
